title: Metallic Balloon Arch Garland Kit, Disco Party Decorations with Chrome Rainbow Colorful Purple Teal Red Hot Pink Blue Balloons Disco Ball Balloons for 80s 90s Theme Birthday Anniversary Party Supplies
features: 🎈 Metallic Disco Balloon Arch Garland Kit - You will get 92 Pcs latex balloons: metallic blue balloons, chrome hot pink balloons (5" 5pcs+10" 4pcs+12" 3pcs+18" 1pc), silver balloons (5" 5pcs+10" 4pcs+12" 3pcs), metallic red balloons, chrome green balloons, metallic purple balloons, gold balloons (5" 5pcs+10" 7pcs), 2pc hot pink and silver explosive star foil balloons, 2pcs disco ball balloons, 16ft balloon stripe tape (1 roll) and 100pc balloon sticky dots (1 roll).

🎈 High Quality Balloons - Our colorful 80s 90s retro dance party balloons set made of durable latex material, which will stay inflated for a long time. Balloons of various sizes are made of thick, sufficient elasticity latex, so that both air or helium easily inflate them. Harmless and non-toxic, safe to be used as balloons decorations for a party. PLEASE NOTE: The color of the balloon is different before and after inflating, and the effect is better after inflating.

🎈 Multiple Applications - The metallic balloon arch kit is perfect for 70s 80s 90s disco birthday, wedding, anniversary, animals baby shower, dance bachelorette party, graduation, engagement, bridal shower, new year, photo shoots and so on. Hang it on walls, across doorways, or as a stunning table centerpiece – the possibilities are endless. You can use your imagination and enjoy the fun of assembling helium balloons with your family and friends.

🎈 Easy to Assemble - Inflate the balloons, tie them, and attach them to the balloon strip provided, and shape the garland to your desired length and design. Recommend various colors and blow up different sizes to get a amazing look to your garland. Then use the glue dots can fix the additional balloons where you want for perfect look. Let your family or friends take beautiful photos with the balloon garland.

🎈Safety and Use - Please do not over-fill the latex balloons and avoid exposing them to direct sunlight, excessive heat, or sharp objects. Providing our customers with high-quality product and services is our goal. You are welcome to email us anytime you want for any question or suggestions. Please remember to always supervise children when playing with balloons, as they can present a choking hazard if not handled properly.
description: 🎉 Introducing the metallic chrome balloon arch garland kit – Transform any space into a vibrant and enchanting party venue with our stunning disco balloon garland kit. Balloon Specifications: ⭐ Material- Crafted from high-quality 100% Natural Latex material, these metallic purple red green gold hot pink blue silver party balloons set are durable and long-lasting, ensuring they will hold up throughout your event. ⭐ Inflatable- Air or Helium. The metallic rainbow colorful balloons kit are perfect for creating a stunning balloon arch, balloon garland, or balloon bouquet. ⭐ Quantity: 92 Pieces ⭐ Include the balloons decorating strip tape and glue dots, which can be designed the balloon garland or balloon arch by yourself. Great For- Whether you're hosting a galaxy party, baby shower, 80s 90s birthday party, anniversary, graduation, bridal shower, disco party decorations，new years decorations, engagement party, or wedding celebration, these disco neon balloon kit are a must-have decoration. How to make the balloon garland? 💕Step 1💕 Inflate balloons to different sizes and tie them. 💕Step 2💕 Put the end of the inflated balloon into the small hole of the arch strip to ensure that it does not come out. 💕Step 3💕 Use tape or rope to fix the finished balloon garland to make the perfect shape you want. Warm Tips: ⚠️ Please do not over-inflate the balloon to avoid pop. ⚠️ Please always supervise children when playing with balloons, balloons can pose a choking hazard if they are not handled properly. ⚠️ Please Note there are measured quantity manually with deviation at 1-5pcs , please kindly understand.
